hero.subtitle: Import-export · Wholesale & retail · Bangui
hero.promoDesc: Get your SY 125-Box at 500,000 FCFA instead of 600,000 FCFA from July 1st to 31st — very limited stock.
hero.gammeDesc: SY 125-Box, 110-42B, 150-9F, SY200-9F: motorcycles built for reliable daily use, in the city or on the road.
hero.piecesDesc: Braking, transmission, suspension, electrical, tires: all SANYA parts available at the showroom.

footer.description: Vitraco RCA — Import-export of SANYA motorcycles and tricycles in Bangui, genuine parts, wholesale and retail.

whyUs.label: Why Vitraco
whyUs.title: Built for intensive use
whyUs.robustesseText: SANYA motorcycles and tricycles designed for Bangui roads, paved or not.
whyUs.grosText: Direct import-export: wholesale prices for resellers, retail prices for individuals.
whyUs.piecesText: Integrated hardware store: find genuine parts compatible with your SANYA model.
whyUs.livraisonText: Delivery in main Bangui neighborhoods, payment on receipt.

about.label: About
about.title: Vitraco RCA
about.desc: Import-export company of SANYA motorcycles and genuine parts, wholesale and retail. Robust utility motorcycles and tricycles adapted for transporting people and goods in the Central African Republic.
about.point1Text: SANYA motorcycles and tricycles imported and sold wholesale and retail.
about.point2Text: Genuine parts in stock for the entire SANYA range.
about.point3Text: Delivery in main neighborhoods, showroom pickup available.

shop.heroMotosDesc: Robust motorcycles for urban and commercial use. Find the SANYA model that suits your needs.
shop.heroTricyclesDesc: SANYA Cargo Tricycle: robustness and load capacity for goods transport.
shop.descAll: Utility motorcycles and tricycles, wholesale and retail. Prices shown exclude delivery fees.
shop.empty: No products in this category at the moment.

hardware.hero1Desc: Braking, transmission, suspension, electrical, tires: all SANYA parts available at the showroom.
hardware.hero2Desc: Our workshop handles routine maintenance and repairs on all SANYA models with genuine parts.
hardware.hero3Desc: Reinforced tires, batteries, chain kits: everything to keep your SANYA in perfect working order.
